interaction_phrase: launched the National Quantum Strategy (NQS) in January 2023, and allocated $360
occurrence_sentence: To strengthen Canada's quantum ecosystem, the Government of Canada launched the National Quantum Strategy (NQS) in January 2023, and allocated $360 million in dedicated funding, in addition to leveraging a number of broad-based, large-scale programs.

To strengthen Canada's quantum ecosystem, the Government of Canada launched the National Quantum Strategy (NQS) in January 2023, and allocated $360 million in dedicated funding, in addition to leveraging a number of broad-based, large-scale programs.

interaction_phrase: collective effort by many actors, including governments (federal, provincial, territorial and Indigenous
occurrence_sentence: Success requires collective effort by many actors, including governments (federal, provincial, territorial and Indigenous governments and organizations), academia and industry, as well as non-profits such as incubators, accelerators and industry associations.

interaction_phrase: to the benefit of Canadian industry, governments and citizens
occurrence_sentence: Make Canada a world leader in the continued development, deployment and use of quantum computing hardware and software—to the benefit of Canadian industry, governments and citizens.

interaction_phrase: held two virtual workshops led by Immigration, Refugee and Citizenship Canada
occurrence_sentence: In December 2022, the National Quantum Strategy Secretariat held two virtual workshops led by Immigration, Refugee and Citizenship Canada, which provided an overview of immigration programming and a Q&A session.

interaction_phrase: to protect the country's world-class research
occurrence_sentence: In consultation with the science and research community, the Government of Canada has taken several measures to protect the country's world-class research and continues to provide support and guidance for implementing research security due diligence.
